meta.poznamky: opakuj(3){ nakresli trojúhelník 60px, penUp, forward(70), penDown }. Vnořená logika.

cms.task_text: Naprogramujte [hlp]tři trojúhelníky o straně 60 px[/hlp] vedle sebe s mezerou 10 px. Použijte smyčku pro celé opakování.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">70</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
